description_long: This is a rectangular wooden dining table with a dark, weathered finish, accompanied by four matching chairs. The table features a simple, robust design with thick, straight legs and a flat, plank-style tabletop. Each chair has a slatted backrest and a solid seat, echoing the table's rustic aesthetic. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the set a natural, slightly textured appearance. There are no visible decorative carvings or embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian, modern-rustic style. The set is suitable for communal dining or gathering spaces in urban environments.
description: A dark, rectangular wooden dining table with four matching slatted-back chairs, featuring a rustic, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the length of the table and the arrangement of two chairs on each side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the width of the table and the slatted backs of the chairs.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the table's length and chair arrangement visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the table's width and the backs of the chairs.
